name: pepe-knowledge-management
description: Agent + human knowledge management: the shared canonical vault every other playbook depends on, per-agent auto-memory discipline, daily learning extraction from chat history, cross-agent shared memory when a human operates multiple isolated agents, and quarterly vault coherence + drift audits. Sibling to pepe-multi-channel-content-pipelines — the content pipeline needs a place to store brand identity, cameo rosters, scene templates; this is that place plus the discipline around keeping it coherent across every agent on the operator's stack.
